analysis.primary_subject: A completed outdoor pergola structure with a thatched roof and decorative elements

craftsmanship_quality.precision: High - The structure appears to be well-aligned with clean cuts and precise joinery
craftsmanship_quality.surface_quality: High - Smooth surfaces with no visible rough edges or splinters
craftsmanship_quality.attention_to_detail: High - The decorative elements and overall finish show meticulous attention to detail

portfolio_presentation.accompanying_text: This rustic pergola showcases a blend of traditional and functional design elements, perfect for creating a cozy outdoor space. The structure features a thatched roof, bamboo supports, and patterned flooring, providing both aesthetic appeal and practical shade.
